archive_summary.title: All Categories
archive_summary.description: Complete category definitions with full detailed descriptions.

section.title: All Categories (Full Detail)
section.content:
Categories: 9
## Agent Evaluation ID: agent-evaluation Version: 1
Tags experimental tasks that execute scope-aware, scope-unaware, or scope-mismatched agents on the annotated benchmark and report Metric 1 (task success), Metric 2 (overconfident error rate), and Metric 3 (can-execute-now vs. must-request accuracy). Covers significance testing and stratified breakdowns by difficulty and granularity.
## Benchmark Annotation ID: benchmark-annotation Version: 1
Tags Phase 1 work that decomposes benchmark tasks into hierarchical solutions and labels gold actions at the global, subtask, and execution levels. Covers annotation schemas, inter-annotator agreement studies, and the construction of the ≥100-task annotated set required by the project's success criteria.
## FrontierScience-Olympiad ID: benchmark-frontierscience Version: 1
Tags any annotation, experiment, or analysis that operates on FrontierScience-Olympiad problems. FrontierScience-Olympiad supplies the project's top-of-hierarchy strategic-planning material. Use this category for stratified per-source breakdowns and for filtering paper or dataset assets that originate from this benchmark.
## SWE-bench Verified ID: benchmark-swebench Version: 1
Tags annotation, experiment, and analysis work that operates on SWE-bench Verified instances. SWE-bench Verified supplies repository-grounded software engineering problems used for atomic-execution evaluation. Use this category for stratified per-source breakdowns and for filtering datasets, models, and predictions that originate from SWE-bench Verified.
## tau-bench ID: benchmark-taubench Version: 1
Tags annotation, experiment, and analysis work that operates on tau-bench dialogues. tau-bench supplies fine-grained tool-use and request-vs-act decisions used in low-level execution evaluation. Use this category for stratified per-source breakdowns and for filtering datasets, models, and predictions that originate from tau-bench runs.
## WorkArena++ ID: benchmark-workarena Version: 1
Tags annotation, experiment, and analysis work that operates on WorkArena++ episodes. WorkArena++ contributes mid-level subtask-planning material to the composite benchmark. Use this category for stratified per-source breakdowns and for filtering datasets, models, and predictions that originate from WorkArena++ runs.
## Granularity Conditioning ID: granularity-conditioning Version: 1
Tags assets and tasks that study the effect of telling the agent which level of the hierarchy it is currently operating at. Covers the three project conditions: scope-aware (A), scope-unaware (B), and scope-mismatched (C). Use this category for prompt designs, ablations, and analyses that turn the granularity label on or off.
## Hierarchical Planning ID: hierarchical-planning Version: 1
Tags work concerned with the three-level hierarchy (strategic / subtask / execution) that all tasks in this project must respect. Covers annotation schemas, plan trees, gold-action enumeration at each level, and any analysis that depends on the hierarchical structure rather than on the conditioning label.
## Uncertainty Calibration ID: uncertainty-calibration Version: 1
Tags assets and tasks that measure or improve the agent's calibration. Covers the overconfident-error-rate metric (Metric 2), confidence-elicitation prompts, and any analysis that relates predicted confidence to action correctness. Use this category for ablations that vary how confidence is requested or scored.
